arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea, Man Utd and Spurs interested in Tel
arts.sum: Arsenal, Chelsea, Manchester United and Tottenham are among the clubs interested in Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel.

arts.ttl: England legend releases astonishing statement on blocked Man Utd January transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United are interested in signing Chloe Kelly from Manchester City in the January transfer window and the England star has now spoken out about her future

arts.ttl: What Man Utd need to secure automatic qualification for Europa League knockout phase
arts.sum: The permutations for Manchester United in terms of qualifying for the round of 16 heading into Matchday 8 of the league phase.

arts.sum: We simulated the final gameweek of the UEFA Europa League league phase to see if Man United can book their spot in the knockout stages.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane says Marcus Rashford should be 'ASHAMED' over Man United exile as Wayne Rooney hits out at 'embarrassing' situation
arts.sum: Rashford will miss his 12th game in a row this evening when United face FCSB and Ruben Amorim has insisted he will only return to the fold if he changes his attitude.

arts.ttl: Diogo Dalot in agreement with Ruben Amorim as he makes Man Utd 'guarantee'
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has endured a frustrating start to life as Manchester United manager, but Diogo Dalot still believes he is the man who can bring success back to Old Trafford

arts.sum: Manchester United's Tyrell Malacia is linked with Celtic as Leuven reportedly have a bid accepted for St Johnstone striker Benjamin Kimpioka

arts.ttl: Rashford 'must change' before Man Utd return - Amorim
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford "has to change" before he will be allowed to return to action for Manchester United, says head coach Ruben Amorim.
